cc:Work.dc:title: ACME Corporation Brand Kit
cc:Work.dc:description: Official brand assets for ACME Corporation. Contains full color, monochrome, and reversed logo variants. For internal and approved partner use only.

Minimum clear space: 1x height of the "A" lettermark
Document ID: ACME-BK-2024-001 | Version 3.2 | Export: Illustrator CC 2024

body.p: ACME Corporation Brand Kit containing full color, monochrome, and reversed logo variants. For approved usage guidelines visit brand.acme-corp.example.com
